title: New Song Spotlight
description: This week’s spotlight is Calum Scott’s "Biblical" — a sweeping modern ballad about a love so immense that ordinary language feels too small. Released in 2021, it later became the opening track on Scott’s album Bridges, and the official recording credits fellow singer-songwriter James Bay among its co-writers. For a Djembe show, it offers vulnerable storytelling, a slow emotional build, and the kind of powerful vocal payoff that can quiet a room before lifting it.
songListNote: Released in 2021 and later placed first on the Bridges tracklist, this soaring love ballad also credits James Bay among its co-writers.
